description:
**Problem**
Most CLI handlers are still implemented in crates/beads-rs/src/cli/commands even though they only use IPC/core/api types and parser/validation helpers already in beads-cli.

**Design**
Relocate pure IPC command handlers (create/show/list/search/ready/blocked/stale/count/deleted/sync/subscribe/update/close/reopen/delete/claim/unclaim/comments/dep/label/epic/status/admin init, excluding upgrade/store/migrate) into beads-cli and wire beads-rs CLI dispatch to them.

**Acceptance**
- [ ] Selected command handlers moved to beads-cli
- [ ] beads-rs dispatch uses beads-cli handler implementations
- [ ] CLI critical path tests pass

**Files:** crates/beads-cli/src/commands/*, crates/beads-rs/src/cli/commands/*, crates/beads-rs/src/cli/mod.rs

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Phase-1 progress landed and stabilized (compile + tests green):

Added new beads-cli read-only handler modules:
- `crates/beads-cli/src/commands/{common,list,search,blocked,ready,stale,count}.rs`
- `crates/beads-cli/src/commands/mod.rs` now defines typed `CommandError` and shared `print_ok`

Current status:
- handler implementations exist under beads-cli for the read-only pure-IPC slice
- beads-rs dispatch rewiring to these moved handlers is NOT complete yet (next step in this bead)
- no behavior changes introduced in active CLI path yet

Validation after stabilizing worker partial state:
- cargo check -p beads-cli
- cargo check -p beads-rs
- cargo test -p beads-rs --test integration -- cli::critical_path:: (6 pass)
- just dylint
All green.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Phase-1 read-only handler migration completed and wired.

Moved/owned implementations in beads-cli:
- `crates/beads-cli/src/commands/{list,search,blocked,ready,stale,count}.rs`
- shared command scaffolding in `crates/beads-cli/src/commands/{mod,common}.rs`

beads-rs dispatch now uses beads-cli implementations for this subset:
- `crates/beads-rs/src/cli/commands/{list,search,blocked,ready,stale,count}.rs`
  now delegate to corresponding beads-cli handlers and re-export moved arg/render types
- added typed conversion `impl From<beads_cli::commands::CommandError> for crate::Error`
  in `crates/beads-rs/src/error.rs`

Result:
- read-only pure IPC path for these commands now executes via beads-cli-owned handler logic
- behavior preserved (critical path remains green)

Validation:
- cargo check -p beads-cli
- cargo check -p beads-rs
- cargo test -p beads-rs --test integration -- cli::critical_path:: (6 pass)
- just dylint
All green.

title: Move pure IPC CLI command handlers from beads-rs into beads-cli
